ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( $Profile.Name = "TSG Sales" ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal Request")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Marketing Qualified Lead")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal Development")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal Presented")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Down Select")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Contract Negotiations")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Contract Accepted")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Started")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed- No Bid") ) ,ISCHANGED(StageName) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to execute this stage progression, please request progression by your supervisor.
